SELECT name, toFloat64OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_float;
CREATE TABLE numbers (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT id, toFloat64OrZero(value) AS result FROM numbers;
SELECT (CASE WHEN toFloat64OrZero(value) > 0 THEN 'Positive' ELSE 'Zero or Error' END) AS status FROM test_float;
WITH (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE id = 1) AS subquery SELECT toFloat64OrZero(subquery);
